'''chayada''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ukiyoe|ukiyoe]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-y-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ukiyoe|ukiyoe]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| chayada
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:chæyædæth|chæyædæth]] || [[word:chæyædæj|chæyædæj]] || [[word:chæyædæsh|chæyædæsh]] || [[word:chæyædæ|chæyædæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:chayayadath|chayayadath]] || [[word:chayayadaj|chayayadaj]] || [[word:chayayadash|chayayadash]] || [[word:chayayada|chayayada]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:chayadath|chayadath]] || [[word:chayadaj|chayadaj]] || [[word:chayadash|chayadash]] || [[word:chayada|chayada]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:chayafdath|chayafdath]] || [[word:chayafdaj|chayafdaj]] || [[word:chayafdash|chayafdash]] || [[word:chayafdaf|chayafdaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chayadatha|chayadatha]] || [[word:chayadaja|chayadaja]] || [[word:chayadasha|chayadasha]] || [[word:chayadaka|chayadaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chayadath|chayadath]] || [[word:chayadaj|chayadaj]] || [[word:chayadash|chayadash]] || [[word:chayada|chayada]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chayadathal|chayadathal]] || [[word:chayadajal|chayadajal]] || [[word:chayadashal|chayadashal]] || [[word:chayadakal|chayadakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chayadathatha|chayadathatha]] || [[word:chayadajaja|chayadajaja]] || [[word:chayadashasha|chayadashasha]] || [[word:chayadaka|chayadaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chayadathan|chayadathan]] || [[word:chayadajan|chayadajan]] || [[word:chayadashan|chayadashan]] || [[word:chayadakan|chayadakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chayadathaoro|chayadathaoro]] || [[word:chayadajaoro|chayadajaoro]] || [[word:chayadashaoro|chayadashaoro]] || [[word:chayadakaoro|chayadakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|28ebc72}}
